## 🙋‍♂️ About Me

<table>

    <td valign="middle" width="70%">

- 🌱 I am a **Data Science** student at the **Industrial University of Ho Chi Minh City**
- 📚 Currently learning **AI Agents** and **AWS**
- 💡 Interested in **Linear Algebra and AI Applications**
